title: Fix Admin Login, Update Cover Tagline, and Replace Instagram QR Code

requirements.summary: Fix the Admin Panel login flow to prevent button getting stuck in 'Initializing...' state and ensure Internet Identity authentication completes successfully
acceptanceCriteria: The login button does not remain stuck in 'Initializing...' indefinitely after credentials are entered
After entering valid credentials, the Internet Identity popup opens and completes successfully
If authentication is cancelled or fails, the button returns to its normal clickable state
Admin is redirected to the Admin Panel upon successful login

file_operations.description: Fix the login button state management to prevent indefinite 'Initializing...' state. Refactor the authentication flow to properly handle credential validation followed by Internet Identity authentication. Add proper error handling and state reset for authentication cancellation or failure scenarios. Ensure the button state transitions correctly through: idle → validating credentials → triggering II auth → processing → success/error. Add timeout handling and proper cleanup of authentication listeners.

requirements.summary: Update the hero section tagline to 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.'
acceptanceCriteria: The cover/hero section displays the text 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.'
No other hero content is altered

file_operations.description: Update the tagline text displayed in the hero section to read 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.' The component fetches text content via useGetTextContent hook, so verify whether the tagline is hardcoded in the JSX or comes from the backend textContent.tagline field. If hardcoded, replace the text directly. If dynamic, the change may need to be made via the Admin Panel's text content management tab instead (but per the BuildRequest, make the frontend change to display this specific text).

requirements.summary: Replace the dynamically generated QR code with the static Instagram QR code image asset
acceptanceCriteria: The QR section displays the official Instagram QR code image (orange/pink gradient with Instagram logo centre)
The '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label is visible below the QR code
The image is served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated
The dynamically generated QR code is no longer rendered

file_operations.description: Replace the dynamically generated QR code with a static image reference. Remove the QR code generation logic and error handling/retry mechanism. Instead, render an element pointing to the generated Instagram QR code asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/instagram-qr-khudrangkalakaar.dim_600x650.png'. Ensure the '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label remains visible below the QR code image. Add appropriate alt text for accessibility.
